security.csp: default-src 'self' data: blob: mediastream:; connect-src 'self' https://app.smartdev.co.ke https://*.supabase.co wss://*.supabase.co https://8x8.vc https://*.jitsi.net wss://*.jitsi.net; img-src 'self' data: blob: https:; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; script-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' https://8x8.vc; media-src 'self' blob: mediastream: https:; worker-src 'self' blob:; frame-src 'self' https://8x8.vc https://*.jitsi.net

bundle.longDescription: SmartDev ERP is a complete school management system for African schools, covering students, staff, fees, timetables, and more.

infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: SmartDev uses the camera for video conferencing and profile photos.
infoPlist.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: SmartDev uses the microphone for video conferencing.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: SmartDev needs photo library access to upload images.
infoPlist.NSUserNotificationsUsageDescription: SmartDev sends notifications for messages and school alerts.
